summary: Automation Rules Engine fully tested. All 13 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI verified with rule table, condition/action badges, New Rule editor with condition/action dropdowns, enable/disable toggles, Suggestions button, and sidebar navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: AutomationRulesService properly initialized with in-memory cache at startup
Two existing rules: TUMALO CREEK - PO Auto-Route (priority 50), AP Invoice Auto-Route (priority 200)
First-match-wins: rules sorted by priority (ascending) - lower number = higher priority
Rule evaluation updates document fields: workflow_queue, review_priority, automation_rule_applied, automation_rule_name
Test doc a1dec76a matched 'AP Invoice Auto-Route' (d02dd03a) - workflow_queue=accounting_review, review_priority=normal
Suggestions endpoint returns empty list (expected - vendor profiles lack sufficient resolution_rate data per agent note)
Rule editor has Select dropdowns for Conditions (16 types) and Actions (5 types)

Supported condition fields: vendor_name, vendor_no, stable_vendor_flag, document_type, validation_state, resolver_match_type, resolver_match_score_gte, reference_domain, automation_success_rate_gte, po_reference_frequency_gte, shipment_reference_frequency_gte, bol_presence_rate_gte, classification_confidence_gte, duplicate_check
Supported action types: route_to_queue, assign_review_priority, flag_for_manual_review, auto_mark_ready, auto_route_to_accounting_queue
seed_data_creation: Used existing rules (04ef6176: TUMALO CREEK - PO Auto-Route, d02dd03a: AP Invoice Auto-Route) and test document a1dec76a-17a2-46d4-a9f9-a0f6fb818208
context_for_next_testing_agent: Automation Rules Engine tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/automation-rules (returns rules array, total), POST /api/automation-rules (creates rule with rule_id, rule_name, priority, conditions, actions, enabled), PUT /api/automation-rules/{rule_id} (updates rule), DELETE /api/automation-rules/{rule_id} (deletes rule), POST /api/automation-rules/{rule_id}/toggle (toggles enabled state), POST /api/automation-rules/evaluate/{doc_id} (evaluates rules for doc - returns matched/rule_id/rule_name/actions_executed or matched=false), GET /api/automation-rules/suggestions (returns suggestions from vendor intelligence - may be empty). Rules are evaluated in priority order (lower=higher). Document fields updated on match: workflow_queue, review_priority, automation_rule_applied, automation_rule_name, automation_rule_applied_at. Frontend page: /automation-rules with AutomationRulesPage.js showing rule table with conditions/actions badges, New Rule button opens editor with condition/action dropdowns, toggle switches for enable/disable, Suggestions button.

GET /api/automation-rules.evidence: Returns rules=[{rule_id, rule_name, priority, conditions, actions, enabled}], total=2. Rules sorted by priority ascending.

POST /api/automation-rules.evidence: Creates rule with generated rule_id, stores conditions/actions, enabled state. Returns created rule.

PUT /api/automation-rules/{rule_id}.evidence: Updates rule fields, sets updated_at timestamp. Returns updated rule.

DELETE /api/automation-rules/{rule_id}.evidence: Deletes rule, returns {status: 'deleted', rule_id}. Subsequent GET returns 404.

POST /api/automation-rules/{rule_id}/tog.evidence: Toggles enabled state (true<->false). Returns updated rule.

POST /api/automation-rules/evaluate/{doc.evidence: Test doc a1dec76a matched rule d02dd03a (AP Invoice Auto-Route). Fields updated: automation_rule_applied=d02dd03a, automation_rule_name='AP Invoice Auto-Route', workflow_queue='accounting_review', review_priority='normal'

GET /api/automation-rules/suggestions.evidence: Returns {suggestions: [], total: 0}. Empty as expected - vendor profiles lack sufficient resolution_rate data for suggestions.

first_match_wins_priority.evidence: Rules sorted by priority (50, 200). TUMALO CREEK rule (50) would match before AP Invoice rule (200) if both conditions matched.

document_fields_after_rule_match.evidence: Document a1dec76a has: automation_rule_applied=d02dd03a, automation_rule_name='AP Invoice Auto-Route', workflow_queue=accounting_review, review_priority=normal

automation_rules_page_loads.evidence: Page shows heading 'Automation Rules', subtitle 'Configure vendor-aware workflow routing', rule table with 2 rules

rule_table_with_conditions_actions_badge.evidence: Table shows conditions badges (Vendor Name, Match Type, Validation State, Document Type) and actions badges (Route to Queue, Review Priority)

new_rule_button_opens_editor.evidence: Clicking '+ New Rule' opens rule editor card with Rule Name input, Priority input, Conditions dropdown, Actions dropdown, Cancel/Save buttons

rule_editor_condition_action_dropdowns.evidence: Condition dropdown shows 'Condition...' placeholder, Action dropdown shows 'Action...' placeholder. Both are Select components.

enable_disable_toggle_works.evidence: Toggle switches work - clicked first toggle, state changed from 'checked' to 'unchecked', toggled back to 'checked'

suggestions_button_functional.evidence: Clicking 'Suggestions' button triggers API call. Panel may be empty if no suggestions available.

automation_rules_nav_in_sidebar.evidence: Sidebar shows 'Automation Rules' nav item with Zap icon, navigates to /automation-rules route

mocked_apis.note: All automation rules APIs use real MongoDB data. Rule evaluation runs against actual documents.
